JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JAN-27-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 220 PER ORDER AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT, JURY DEMAND STICKEN - TO COURT TRIAL.

KEVIN V. RYAN, JUDGE; G.ESPINOCILLA,CLERK; D.COSTELLO,CSR. 9:39 AM CASE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF. EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED AND JUDGMENT IS SIGNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADISON, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 691 O'FARRELL STREET, APARTMENT #301, SAN FRANCISCO,CA. $1,232.59 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $133.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,865.59, LEASE FORFEITED
